name: Cryptographic Security Audit
description: Full cryptographic correctness audit: constant-time discipline, key management, PQC readiness.

phases.name: Threat Model

delegates.task_template: Define the cryptographic threat model and mandatory security requirements for: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: Threat model documented with crypto-specific requirements

phases.name: Crypto Audit

delegates.task_template: Perform a full cryptographic correctness audit covering constant-time discipline, key management, nonce handling, and PQC readiness for: ${goal}
Test for timing side-channels, padding oracle, and key extraction vulnerabilities in: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: All cryptographic findings classified and remediation planned

phases.name: Verification

delegates.task_template: Verify all crypto audit findings have been addressed and no regressions introduced for: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: Crypto audit signed off by reviewer
